title: Nova PVP
description: A texture pack that has small swords, better wool and other things that a pvp pack would have. 1.8.9 Pack for Bedwars, Skywars and other.
body:
![Nova PVP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b15c22e31865ea7e9d4b75f9b2e06e51d6da0e0a.png)

**A texture pack that has everything that a pvp pack would have! You'll fell _in love_ with it**

# VERSION OF THE PACK
The version of this pack will be always 1.8.9, unless Hypixel doesn't change it to a major version, but anyways, this pack for now will be in the version 1.8.9

You'll be asking:
## WHY THIS VERSION
Well, this version is good for pvp because it doesn't have the damage indicators _(it means that you can spam your sword)_ and other stuff.

# TEXTURES OF THE PACK
This is my first time doing a pvp texture pack, and actually completing it, but i'm proud of myself of what ~~good~~ textures I made. The only thing that i didn't change was the sky because i don't know how, but anyways, i think my textures are decent, not bad, not good, but decent.

# DONATE PAGE
If you end up somehow downloading and using the pack, make sure to leave some penny down here, so i can update this pack or maybe make even more, who knows.

<details>
<summary>Click here⬇️</summary>
